Welcome to Trap City Cafe
Step inside Trap City Cafe, where Atlanta energy meets bold culinary creativity. Every corner pulses with personality, and every dish is crafted to make your visit memorable. Whether it’s a casual hangout or a night out with friends, our space brings together great food, lively atmosphere, and a vibe you won’t forget.
Creations That Spark Curiosity
At Trap City Cafe, every dish is designed to surprise and engage. From unexpected flavor combinations to striking presentations, each plate offers a unique experience. The menu blends creativity with craftsmanship, inviting you to explore, share, and enjoy meals that feel as lively and original as the city itself.
Explore Our Menu
Order From Our Website
Craving the Trap City Cafe experience but can’t make it in person? Order online for fresh, vibrant dishes delivered right to your door. Quick, easy, and made with the same energy and care as dining with us, your next memorable meal is just a few clicks away.
Order Now
Explore Our Culinary Creations
Dive into our gallery and experience the energy behind each plate.
Image gallery

Important Dining Policies at Trap City Cafe
o ensure the best experience for all guests:
We only seat complete parties.
All parties have a two-hour seating limit.
A 20% gratuity is automatically added to all dine-in tabs.
To-go orders include a 10% automatic gratuity.
All food and drink orders are final; returns are not accepted.
Thank you for choosing Trap City Cafe—we appreciate your understanding and look forward to serving you!
Ready to Claim Your Spot?
Planning a night out, a celebration, or just a fun meal with friends? Reserve your table now and make sure you don’t miss the energy, bold flavors, and unforgettable vibe that only Trap City Cafe delivers.
Reserve Your Table
Ready to Elevate Your Event?
Bring the bold flavors and lively energy of Trap City Cafe to your gathering. Our catering service delivers creative, crave-worthy dishes that make any event unforgettable—perfect for parties, office events, or special celebrations.
Let Us Cater Your Event
A Place For Everyone
Whether you prefer the fresh air of our outdoor seating or the cozy vibe inside, Trap City Cafe has a place for you. Sip on expertly crafted cocktails, soak in the atmosphere, and enjoy a space where everyone feels welcome.
Visit Us Today!! 🍽️
Experience the energy, bold flavors, and vibrant vibes of Trap City Cafe any day of the week. We’re open:
Hours:
Thu, Mon–Wed: 5 PM–2 AM
Fri–Sat: 1 PM–2 AM
Sun: 1 PM–12 AM

I am "really Ol School." But I am TOTALLY impressed with these young people. The Divas and Gents Bicycle group went here for dinner. Our server Erin and their team lead did a wonderful job with our large group. They were kind and professional.

#trapcitycafe is a VIBE! Came in for Saturday brunch before our slot for the escape room at #trapmusicmuseum. We arrived right before 1pm, so we were the first ones here. I thought I would be enjoying a quiet lunch with my son.
